cards.back: A measure of the impact of a single observation on the regression coefficients
A graphical representation of the residuals in a regression model to check for normality and heteroscedasticity
A statistic used to detect autocorrelation in the residuals of a regression model
A condition in regression analysis where the variance of the residuals is not constant across all levels of the independent variable
A statistical test used to detect heteroscedasticity in the residuals of a regression model
